# Jonas Suhard

Growth Engineer junior - marketing, IA generative et full-stack.

Jonas construit des systemes marketing augmentes par l'IA : sites, automatisations, contenus, workflows LLM et dashboards qui transforment une strategie en produit utilisable.

## Profil

- Profile: /profile.md
- Structured profile: /profile.json
- Skills: /skills.md
- Recruiter page: /recruteurs
- CV: /cv.pdf

## Projets principaux

- Les Petites Griffes - site live, CMS, SEO local, assistant IA: /projects/les-petites-griffes.md
- Educool / La Herse - application web de classe, Firebase, securite, PDF: /projects/educool-la-herse.md
- Capselys - refonte conversion, experimentation IA, workshop client: /projects/capselys.md
- ISCOM - SEO, Drupal, production editoriale, audits: /projects/iscom.md
